projects.name: tamilnadu.tech
projects.description: Similar to blr.today, All the Tamil Nadu Tech Meetups are aggregated and displayed in one place, helping the tech ecosystem of tamil nadu to thrive.
projects.short_description: Get All your Tamil Nadu Tech Meetups in one place

form.question: How to support
form.response: Follow me on linkedin, that's more than enough XD: https://www.linkedin.com/in/justinbenito/

form.question: A small brief about your project
form.response: All your Tamil Nadu Tech Meetups aggregated in one single place

form.question: One FOSS maintainer lesson for your younger self
form.response: open source is not that scary ( a bit yes 🥰 ) so just start building and launching and listening to the community 🚀

form.question: Why do you do it? Why do you bother maintaining a FOSS project?
form.response: I strongly believe that great products involve a lot of great minds, and the internet is just the right place to find some great minds. You get to learn a lot from them.

form.question: If your repo had a theme song, what would it be?
form.response: vetti pasanga vela ithunu solluravanga vetu payaga ( song: aagasam ) from soorarai potru

form.question: Which file in your project would you most like to set on fire?
form.response: event.d.ts 🥰 ( not a big fan of typescript )

form.question: What's your open-source villain origin story?
form.response: nothing as of now, but maybe in the multiverse: if a company rejects me and out of pure spite I build an open source version of them, that's the level of villainy I can imagine 😈

form.question: If you had to use one emoji to convey what it is like to be a FOSS maintainer, what would it be?
